Identification.LongTitle: An Act to give effect to the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 and to make consequential amendments to other Acts
Identification.ShortTitle: Final Self-Government Agreement for the t脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act
Identification.RunningHead: Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act

Provision.Text: Her Excellency the Governor General recommends to the House of Commons the appropriation of public revenue under the circumstances, in the manner and for the purposes set out in a measure entitled 芒聙聹An Act to give effect to the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 and to make consequential amendments to other Acts芒聙聺.
This enactment gives effect to the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 and makes consequential amendments to other Acts.

Heading.TitleText: An Act to give effect to the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 and to make consequential amendments to other Acts

TableOfProvisions.Label: 芒聙聜

Text.XRefExternal: Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act

TableOfProvisions.Text: Status of T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement

Heading.TitleText: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement

TableOfProvisions.Text: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement given effect
T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement prevails

Heading.TitleText: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government

TableOfProvisions.Text: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Tax Treatment Agreement
Judicial notice 芒聙聰 T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law

Text.XRefExternal: Payments in Lieu of Taxes Act
First Nations Goods and Services Tax Act

Provision.Text: Whereas the Government of Canada recognizes that the inherent right of self-government is a right recognized and affirmed by section 35 of the Constitution Act, 1982 and that the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 have that inherent right;

Whereas the Sahtu Dene and Metis Comprehensive Land Claim Agreement, signed on September 6, 1993, provides for the negotiation of self-government agreements among the Sahtu Dene and Metis and the Governments of Canada and the Northwest Territories;

Whereas the Sahtu Dene and Metis Comprehensive Land Claim Agreement provides that self-government negotiations will address the desire of the Sahtu Dene and Metis to have self-government exercised as close to the community level as is reasonably possible;

Whereas the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶, as represented by The Tlegohli Got芒聙聶ine Government Incorporated, the Governments of Canada and the Northwest Territories have negotiated the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 in accordance with chapter 5 and appendix B of the Sahtu Dene and Metis Comprehensive Land Claim Agreement;

Whereas the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 and the Government of Canada are committed to achieving reconciliation through a renewed nation-to-nation relationship based on respect, cooperation, partnership and the recognition of T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 rights;

Whereas the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 aspire to participate fully in the economic, social, political and cultural aspects of Canadian society in a way that preserves and enhances the collective identity of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 as a self-sufficient and sustainable community now and into the future;

Whereas the Government of Canada is committed to implementing the United Nations Declaration on the Rights of Indigenous Peoples, and The Tlegohli Got芒聙聶ine Government Incorporated and the Government of Canada view the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement as contributing to the implementation of that Declaration;
Whereas the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 ratified that Agreement on March 31, 2025;
Whereas that Agreement was signed on September 18, 2025 on behalf of The Tlegohli Got芒聙聶ine Government Incorporated and the Governments of Canada and the Northwest Territories;
And whereas that Agreement requires the coming into force of an Act of Parliament that gives effect to it;
Now therefore, His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: This Act may be cited as the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act.
The following definitions apply in this Act.

Definition.Text: Sahtu Agreement芒聙聜has the meaning assigned by the definition Agreement in section 2 of the Sahtu Dene and Metis Land Claim Settlement Act.芒聙聜(accord du Sahtu)
Effective Date芒聙聜means the date on which Parts I, II and IV of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement take effect in accordance with 7.10 of that Agreement.芒聙聜(date d芒聙聶entr脙漏e en vigueur)
T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶芒聙聜has the same meaning as in 1.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.芒聙聜(T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶)

T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement芒聙聜means the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 among The Tlegohli Got芒聙聶ine Government Incorporated and the Governments of Canada and the Northwest Territories, signed on September 18, 2025, including any amendments made to it.芒聙聜(accord des T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶)
T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government芒聙聜has the same meaning as in 1.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.芒聙聜(gouvernement des T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶)
The Tlegohli Got芒聙聶ine Government Incorporated芒聙聜has the same meaning as in 1.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.芒聙聜(soci脙漏t脙漏 The Tlegohli Got芒聙聶ine Government Incorporated)

T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law芒聙聜has the meaning assigned by the definition T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Law in 1.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.芒聙聜(loi des T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶)

T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Tax Treatment Agreement芒聙聜means the tax treatment agreement entered into under 8.13.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, including any amendments made to it.芒聙聜(accord sur le traitement fiscal des T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶)

Transition Date芒聙聜means the date on which Part II of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement is no longer in effect and Part III of that Agreement takes effect in accordance with 6.6.1 and 7.10.4 of that Agreement.芒聙聜(date de transition)

Section.MarginalNote: Status of T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement
Section.Text: The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement is a treaty within the meaning of sections 25 and 35 of the Constitution Act, 1982.

Heading.TitleText: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement

Section.MarginalNote: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement given effect

Subsection.Text: The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement is approved, given effect and declared valid and has the force of law.

For greater certainty, a person or entity has the powers, rights, privileges and benefits conferred on the person or entity by the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement and must perform the duties, and is subject to the liabilities, imposed on the person or entity by the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.
For greater certainty, the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement is binding on, and may be relied on by, all persons and entities.

Section.MarginalNote: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement prevails

Subsection.Text: Subject to section 6, in the event of an inconsistency or conflict between the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement and this Act or any other federal law, the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement prevails to the extent of the inconsistency or conflict.
Subject to section 6, in the event of an inconsistency or conflict between this Act and any other federal law, this Act prevails to the extent of the inconsistency or conflict.

Section.Text: In the event of an inconsistency or conflict between the Sahtu Dene and Metis Land Claim Settlement Act or the Sahtu Agreement and the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, this Act or any T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law, the Sahtu Dene and Metis Land Claim Settlement Act or the Sahtu Agreement prevails to the extent of the inconsistency or conflict.

Heading.TitleText: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government

Section.Text: The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government is a legal entity and has the capacity, rights, powers and privileges of a natural person.
Any T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law that is made in accordance with the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement has the force of law.

Subject to 2.9 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, the Indian Act does not apply to the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government or any citizen, within the meaning of 1.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, as of the day on which section 4 comes into force.
A T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law is not a statutory instrument for the purposes of the Statutory Instruments Act.

Section.MarginalNote: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Tax Treatment Agreement
Section.Text: The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Tax Treatment Agreement is approved, given effect and declared valid and has the force of law during the period that it is in effect.

The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Tax Treatment Agreement does not form part of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, and it is not a treaty or a land claims agreement within the meaning of sections 25 and 35 of the Constitution Act, 1982.

Subsection.Text: Judicial notice must be taken of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement and the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Tax Treatment Agreement.
The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement and the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Tax Treatment Agreement must be published by the King芒聙聶s Printer.

A copy of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement or the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Tax Treatment Agreement published by the King芒聙聶s Printer is evidence of that agreement and of its contents, and a copy purporting to be published by the King芒聙聶s Printer is presumed to be so published unless the contrary is shown.

Section.MarginalNote: Judicial notice 芒聙聰 T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law

Subsection.Text: Judicial notice must be taken of any T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law that is registered in the public register referred to in 8.9 or 30.9 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.

A copy of any T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law purporting to be deposited in the public register referred to in 8.9 or 30.9 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement is evidence of that law and of its contents, unless the contrary is shown.
The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government and its institutions are not federal boards, commissions or other tribunals as defined in subsection 2(1) of the Federal Courts Act.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Jurisdiction 芒聙聰 Supreme Court of Northwest Territories
Subsection.Text: The Supreme Court of the Northwest Territories has exclusive original jurisdiction to hear and determine applications for judicial review of the decisions of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government or its institutions, provided that all appeal and review mechanisms set out in T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law have been exhausted.
In this section, institutions has the meaning assigned by the definition Institutions of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government in 1.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.

If an issue arises in any judicial or administrative proceeding in respect of the interpretation, validity or applicability of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, of this Act, of the Act of the legislature of the Northwest Territories that gives effect to the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement or of any T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law, then the issue must not be decided until the party raising it has served notice on the Attorney General of Canada, the Attorney General of the Northwest Territories and the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government.

The notice must describe the proceeding, state the issue and the day on which it is to be argued, give the particulars that are necessary to show the point to be argued and, unless the court or tribunal authorizes a shorter period, be served at least 14 days before the day on which the issue is to be argued.

The Attorney General of Canada, the Attorney General of the Northwest Territories and the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government may appear and participate in the proceeding as parties with the same rights as any other party.
For greater certainty, subsections (2) and (3) do not require that an oral hearing be held if one is not otherwise required.

Section.Text: Despite subsection 4(1), 2.7 and chapter 7 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement are deemed to have effect as of November 20, 2024.

The Governor in Council may make any orders and regulations that the Governor in Council considers necessary for the purpose of carrying out the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement 芒聙聰 including to set the Effective Date and Transition Date 芒聙聰 or of any other agreement that is related to its implementation.
Subsection 13(3) of the Access to Information Act is amended by adding the following after paragraph (c):

Paragraph.Label: (c.1)
Paragraph.Text: the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government, as defined in section 2 of the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act;

Heading.TitleText: Payments in Lieu of Taxes Act

Section.Text: The definition taxing authority in subsection 2(1) of the Payments in Lieu of Taxes Act is amended by adding the following after paragraph (g.1):

Paragraph.Label: (g.2)
Paragraph.Text: the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government, as defined in section 2 of the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act, if it levies and collects a real property tax or a frontage or area tax in respect of lands within T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓, as described in schedule B of the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 that is approved, given effect and declared valid by that Act,

Section.Text: Subsection 8(7) of the Privacy Act is amended by adding the following after paragraph (c):

Paragraph.Label: (c.1)
Paragraph.Text: the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government, as defined in section 2 of the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act;

Section.Text: Subsection 19(1) of the Act is amended by striking out 芒聙聹or芒聙聺 at the end of paragraph (f), by adding 芒聙聹or芒聙聺 at the end of paragraph (g) and by adding the following after paragraph (g):

Paragraph.Label: (h)
Paragraph.Text: the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government, as defined in section 2 of the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act.

Subsection.Text: The definition local government in section 2 of the Mackenzie Valley Resource Management Act is replaced by the following:

Definition.Text: local government芒聙聜means any local government established under the laws of the Northwest Territories, including a city, town, village, hamlet, charter community, settlement or government of a Tlicho community, whether incorporated or not, and includes the territorial government in the case where it is acting in the place of that local government in accordance with those laws. It also includes the D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government in the case where it is exercising the jurisdiction and authority set out in 9.1 of the D脙漏line Agreement and the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government in the case where it is exercising the jurisdiction and authority set out in 47.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.芒聙聜(administration locale)

Subsection.Text: The definition Sahtu First Nation in section 2 of the Act is replaced by the following:

Definition.Text: Sahtu First Nation芒聙聜means the Sahtu Dene and Metis as represented by The Sahtu Secretariat Incorporated, a corporation without share capital under Part II of the Canada Corporations Act, R.S.C. 1970, c. C-32, being the successor, for the purposes of this Act, to the Sahtu Tribal Council referred to in the Sahtu Agreement, or by any successor to that corporation. It also includes the D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government and the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government in the case where The Sahtu Secretariat Incorporated or its successor has made a delegation or assignment to those governments of any powers and functions conferred under this Act.芒聙聜(premi脙篓re nation du Sahtu)

Subsection.Text: Section 2 of the Act is amended by adding the following in alphabetical order:

Definition.Text: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement芒聙聜means the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 among The Tlegohli Got芒聙聶ine Government Incorporated and the Governments of Canada and the Northwest Territories, signed on September 18, 2025, including any amendments made to it, that is approved, given effect and declared valid by the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act.芒聙聜(accord des T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶)
T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government芒聙聜has the same meaning as in 1.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.芒聙聜(gouvernement des T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶)

T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law芒聙聜has the meaning assigned by the definition T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Law in 1.1 of the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.芒聙聜(loi des T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶)
T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Settlement Lands芒聙聜means the lands set out in schedule C to the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.芒聙聜(terres d脙漏sign脙漏es des T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶)

Section.Text: Section 4 of the Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (5):

Subsection.MarginalNote: Delegation by T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government
Subsection.Text: The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government may, in conformity with the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, delegate any of its functions under this Act to

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: a body or office established by a T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: a department, agency or office of the federal or the territorial government;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: a board or other public body established by or under an Act of Parliament or by a territorial law; or

Section.Text: Subsection 5(1) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Subsection.Text: If there is any inconsistency or conflict between this Act and a land claim agreement, the D脙漏line Agreement, the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, an Act giving effect to any of those agreements or the Indian Act, then the land claim agreement, the D脙漏line Agreement, the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, the Act or the Indian Act prevails over this Act to the extent of the inconsistency or conflict.

Section.Text: Subsection 8(1) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Subsection.Text: The federal Minister shall consult the first nations, the Tlicho Government, the D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government and the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government with respect to the amendment of this Act.

Section.Text: Subsection 16(2) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Subsection.Text: A member of a board is not placed in a material conflict of interest merely because of any status or entitlement conferred on the member under the Gwich芒聙聶in Agreement, the Sahtu Agreement, the Tlicho Agreement or any other agreement between a first nation and His Majesty in right of Canada for the settlement of a claim to lands or under the D脙漏line Agreement or the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.

Section.Text: Section 22 of the Act is replaced by the following:

Subject to any other federal or territorial law and any Tlicho law, D脙漏line law or T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law, a board may obtain from any department or agency of the federal or territorial government, the Tlicho Government, D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government or T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government any information in the possession of the department, agency, Tlicho Government, D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government or T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government that the board requires for the performance of its functions.
Subsection 31(1) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Subsection.Text: Sections 3, 5 and 11 of the Statutory Instruments Act do not apply in respect of rules under section 30, a land use plan or amendment to a land use plan under Part 2, rules under subsection 49(2), policy directions under subsection 50.1(1) or 83(1), (2), (2.1) or (2.2), guidelines or policies under section 65, directions under section 106, policy directions under section 109 or 109.1 or subsection 142.2(1) or guidelines under section 120.

Section.Text: Section 63 of the Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (5):

Subsection.MarginalNote: Consultation with T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government
Subsection.Text: The Sahtu Land and Water Board shall consult the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government before issuing, amending or renewing any licence, permit or authorization for a use of T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Settlement Lands or waters on those lands or a deposit of waste on those lands or in those waters.
Section 83 of the Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (1.1):

Subsection.MarginalNote: Notice to T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government
Subsection.Text: The federal Minister shall inform the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government of the Minister芒聙聶s intention to give written policy directions to the Sahtu Land and Water Board, if the policy directions are in relation to the use of land or waters or the deposit of waste in the area described in schedule A to the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.
Section 83 of the Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (2.1):

Subsection.MarginalNote: Policy directions by T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government
Subsection.Text: The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government may, after consultation with the Sahtu Land and Water Board and the federal Minister, give written policy directions to the Board with respect to the performance of any of the Board芒聙聶s functions under this Part in relation to the use of T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Settlement Lands. Policy directions are binding on the Board to the extent that compliance with them does not require the Board to exceed its approved budget.
Subsection 83(5) of the Act is replaced by the following:

If there is a conflict between policy directions given by the federal Minister under subsection (1) and policy directions given by the Tlicho Government under subsection (2), by the D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government under subsection (2.1) or by the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government under subsection (2.2), the policy directions given under subsection (2), (2.1) or (2.2), as the case may be, prevail to the extent of the conflict.
Subsection 83(6) of the English version of the Act is replaced by the following:

Subsection.MarginalNote: Conflict between legislation and policy directions
Subsection.Text: If there is a conflict between policy directions given by the federal Minister, the Tlicho Government, the D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government or the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government under this section and the provisions of any Act of Parliament, of any regulations made under an Act of Parliament or of any territorial law, those provisions prevail to the extent of the conflict.

Section.Text: Subsection 85(4) of the Act is amended by striking out 芒聙聹or芒聙聺 at the end of paragraph (b), by adding 芒聙聹or芒聙聺 at the end of paragraph (c) and by adding the following after paragraph (c):

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government, if the entry is on T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Settlement Lands.

Section.Text: The Act is amended by adding the following after section 90.11:

Section.MarginalNote: Prohibition 芒聙聰 T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Settlement Lands
Section.Text: Even if the regulations do not require a permit or other authorization under Part 3 or 4 for a particular use of land, a person shall not use T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Settlement Lands without such a permit or authorization if one is required by a T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law for uses of that type.
The Act is amended by adding the following after section 90.21:

Despite the regulations, a permit or other authorization under Part 3 or 4 for a particular use of land within T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓, as described in schedule B to the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement, is not required if a T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law provides that one is not required for uses of that type.
Section 95 of the Act is replaced by the following:

Despite subsection 72.03(1) or any territorial law, the Gwich芒聙聶in and Sahtu First Nations, the Tlicho Government, the D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government and the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government are not required to pay any fee in respect of the use of waters or the deposit of waste for non-commercial purposes on their first nation lands, Tlicho lands, D脙漏line lands or T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Settlement Lands, as the case may be.
Subsection 106.1(2) of the Act is amended by striking out 芒聙聹and芒聙聺 at the end of paragraph (d), by adding 芒聙聹and芒聙聺 at the end of paragraph (e) and by adding the following after paragraph (e):

Paragraph.Label: (f)
Paragraph.Text: the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government with respect to the amendment of any T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law regarding the use of T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Settlement Lands or waters on those lands or regarding a deposit of waste on those lands or in those waters.

Section.Text: The Act is amended by adding the following after section 109.11:

Heading.TitleText: Powers of T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government

Section.MarginalNote: Policy directions by T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government
Section.Text: The T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government may exercise the same powers and shall perform the same duties in relation to the Board and the regional panel of the Board referred to in subsection 99(2) as those that the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government has under section 83 in relation to the Sahtu Land and Water Board.
Section 109.2 of the Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (4):

Subsection.Text: If there is a conflict between policy directions given by the federal Minister under section 109 and policy directions given by the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government under section 109.12, the policy directions given under section 109.12 prevail to the extent of the conflict.

Subsection.MarginalNote: Conflict between legislation and policy directions
Subsection.Text: If there is a conflict between policy directions given by the federal Minister under section 109 or by the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government under section 109.12 and the provisions of any Act of Parliament, of any regulations made under an Act of Parliament or of any territorial law, those provisions prevail to the extent of the conflict.

Section.Text: Section 118 of the Act is replaced by the following:

Section.MarginalNote: Issuance of licence, permit or other authorization

Subsection.Text: A licence, permit or other authorization required for the carrying out of a development shall not be issued under any federal or territorial law, Tlicho law, D脙漏line law or T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law unless the requirements of this Part have been complied with.

If the Gwich芒聙聶in or Sahtu First Nation, the Tlicho Government, the D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government, the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government, a local government or a department or agency of the federal or territorial government proposes to carry out a development that does not require a licence, permit or other authorization under any federal or territorial law, Tlicho law, D脙漏line law or T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 law, it shall comply with the requirements of this Part before taking any irrevocable action in relation to the development.

Section.Text: Section 121 of the Act is replaced by the following:

The Review Board, a review panel of the Review Board, a review panel or joint panel established jointly by the Review Board and any other person or body, the federal Minister, a responsible minister, a designated regulatory agency, a regulatory authority, a department or agency of the federal or territorial government, a local government, the Gwich芒聙聶in or Sahtu First Nation, the Tlicho Government, the D脙漏line Got芒聙聶ine Government or the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government shall issue and make available to the public written reasons for any decision or recommendation made under the process established by this Part.
Subsection 123.2(2) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Subsection.Text: A person is not placed in a material conflict of interest merely because of any status or entitlement conferred on the person under the Gwich芒聙聶in Agreement, the Sahtu Agreement, the Tlicho Agreement or any other agreement between a first nation and His Majesty in right of Canada for the settlement of a claim to lands or under the D脙漏line Agreement or the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Agreement.

Heading.TitleText: First Nations Goods and Services Tax Act

Section.Text: Schedule 1 to the First Nations Goods and Services Tax Act is amended by adding the following in alphabetical order:

Text.InlineFont: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶

Provision.Text: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government

Lands within T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 and Settlement Lands, as those terms are defined in 1.1 of the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 that is approved, given effect and declared valid by the Final Self-Government Agreement for the T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Act

Section.Text: If Bill C-10, introduced in the 1st session of the 45th Parliament and entitled the Commissioner for Modern Treaty Implementation Act, receives royal assent, then, on the first day on which both that Act and section 4 of this Act are in force, the schedule to that Act is amended by adding the following in alphabetical order:

BilingualGroup.BilingualItemEn: T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶 Government
BilingualGroup.BilingualItemFr: Gouvernement des T脜聜eg脟芦脤聛h脜聜脛卤脤篓 Got芒聙聶脛炉n脛聶

Subsection.Text: Sections 1 to 16, 18, 19, 21 and 22, subsections 23(2) and (3) and sections 24 to 33 and 35 to 42 come into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council.
Section 20, subsection 23(1) and section 34 come into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council, but that day must not be before the day referred to in subsection (1).
